expected_contracts: fixed-cap replacement only at exact queue capacity
protected refresh replaces one oldest unlocked stale imminent event
auditable dead lifecycle transition before protected admission
correlation rejection precedes any destructive queue-pressure transition

feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

import pytest

from mesh_queue import repository as repo


def _event(event_id, *, cause="imminent_eval", created_at, locked=False, payload=None):
    return repo.Event(
        id=event_id,
        source_node_id="source",
        cause=cause,
        payload=dict(payload or {"original": event_id}),
        correlation_id=f"cid-{event_id}",
        created_at=created_at,
        locked=locked,
    )


@pytest.mark.parametrize("protected_cause", ["brain_market_snapshots", "momentum_context_refresh"])
def test_protected_refresh_replaces_oldest_stale_imminent_at_exact_capacity(monkeypatch, protected_cause):
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH", 3)
    now = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)
    old = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 0, 0)
    db = repo.MemorySession([
        _event(2, created_at=old),
        _event(1, created_at=old),
        _event(3, created_at=old + timedelta(minutes=1)),
    ])
    event_id = repo.enqueue_activation(
        db,
        source_node_id="nm_event_bus",
        cause=protected_cause,
        payload={"signal_type": protected_cause},
        correlation_id=f"protected-{protected_cause}",
        now=now,
    )
    assert event_id == 4
    assert repo.pending_queue_depth(db) == 3
    dead = [event for event in db.events if event.status == "dead"]
    assert [event.id for event in dead] == [1]
    assert dead[0].processed_at == now.replace(tzinfo=None)
    assert dead[0].payload["original"] == 1
    audit = dead[0].payload["_queue_pressure_shed"]
    assert audit["shed_for_cause"] == protected_cause
    assert audit["age_seconds"] == 7200.0
    assert db.events[-1].cause == protected_cause


def test_unprotected_incoming_cause_never_sheds(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH", 2)
    old = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 0, 0)
    db = repo.MemorySession([_event(1, created_at=old), _event(2, created_at=old)])
    assert repo.enqueue_activation(
        db,
        source_node_id="ordinary",
        cause="setup_vitals_change",
        correlation_id="ordinary",
        now=datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0),
    ) == -1
    assert all(event.status == "pending" for event in db.events)
